hero.eyebrow: For runners planning their next race
hero.title: Find a race, check the details, and register with confidence
hero.description: Use RunGoMX to compare events, confirm dates and pricing, and come back later for official results and rankings.

proofPaths.title: Start with what you need
proofPaths.description: Most visitors come here to do one of three things: find a race, check results, or compare rankings.

events.title: Find your next event
events.description: Browse races by date, location, and discipline, then open the event page for pricing and registration details.

results.title: Check official results
results.description: Search by runner, bib, or event and open the latest official results page.

rankings.title: Compare rankings
rankings.description: See the latest standings built from published race results.

eventPages.title: Know the key details before you commit
eventPages.description: Each event page is built to answer the questions runners ask before they sign up.
eventPages.cardTitle: What you can check on every event page

highlights.clarity: Registration status and pricing in plain view.
highlights.trust: Dates, distances, and event details in one place.
highlights.conversion: Policies and organizer information easy to find.

participation.title: Move from discovery to race day with less guesswork
participation.description: RunGoMX helps runners discover events, compare details, and commit when the information is clear.

highlights.decide: Compare pricing, dates, and policies with confidence.
highlights.commit: Register when you are ready without hunting for key details.

resultsRankings.title: Need results, rankings, or more about RunGoMX?
resultsRankings.description: Not every visit starts with registration. These links take you straight to the rest of the public site.

highlights.results: Search official results for a runner, bib, or event.
highlights.rankings: See current standings built from published results.
highlights.retention: Learn how RunGoMX helps runners before and after race day.

aboutBridge.title: About RunGoMX
aboutBridge.description: See how RunGoMX helps runners find events, register, and check official results.

finalCta.title: Ready to compare events?
finalCta.description: Browse the event directory to check dates, pricing, and registration status.
